function DotProduct(a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>): int\n  requires |a| == |b|\n  decreases |a|\n{\n  if |a| == 0 then 0\n  else DotProduct(a[..|a|-1], b[..|b|-1]) + a[|a|-1] * b[|b|-1]\n}\n\nghost predicate AllNonZero(s: seq<int>) {\n  forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: s[i] != 0\n}\n\nghost predicate AllBounded(s: seq<int>, bound: int) {\n  forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: -bound <= s[i] <= bound\n}\n\nghost predicate ValidSolution(a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>) {\n  |a| == |b|\n  && AllNonZero(b)\n  && AllBounded(b, 100)\n  && DotProduct(a, b) == 0\n}\n\nlemma DotProductAppend(a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>, x: int, y: int)\n  requires |a| == |b|\n  ensures DotProduct(a + [x], b + [y]) == DotProduct(a, b) + x * y\n{\n  var a' := a + [x];\n  var b' := b + [y];\n  assert a'[..|a'|-1] == a;\n  assert b'[..|b'|-1] == b;\n}\n\nmethod FindSasuke(a: seq<int>) returns (b: seq<int>)\n  requires |a| % 2 == 0\n  requires AllNonZero(a)\n  requires AllBounded(a, 100)\n  ensures ValidSolution(a, b)\n{\n  b := [];\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < |a|\n    invariant 0 <= i <= |a|\n    invariant |b| == i\n    invariant AllNonZero(b)\n    invariant AllBounded(b, 100)\n    invariant i % 2 == 0 ==> DotProduct(a[..i], b) == 0\n    invariant i % 2 == 1 ==> DotProduct(a[..i], b) == a[i - 1] * a[i]\n  {\n    if i % 2 == 0 {\n      DotProductAppend(a[..i], b, a[i], a[i + 1]);\n      assert a[..i] + [a[i]] == a[..i + 1];\n      b := b + [a[i + 1]];\n    } else {\n      DotProductAppend(a[..i], b, a[i], -a[i - 1]);\n      assert a[..i] + [a[i]] == a[..i + 1];\n      b := b + [-a[i - 1]];\n    }\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n  assert a[..|a|] == a;\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":11394,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":11394},"output_tokens":14,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"b1ddeb00-0880-4222-b24d-df95c85101bd","uuid":"b2de54e5-0cf4-45b1-b2b7-d08cdbaa6d50"},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"allowed_warning","resetsAt":1773824400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","utilization":0.9,"isUsingOverage":false,"surpassedThreshold":0.9},"uuid":"b1bcb827-34ff-4ff5-81b9-c46131fbdf2a","session_id":"b1ddeb00-0880-4222-b24d-df95c85101bd"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013H6sfEr3vMrc89jPjcZxxP","type":"tool_result","content":"File Here's what I added:\n\n1. **`DotProductAppend` lemma** — proves that `DotProduct(a + [x], b + [y]) == DotProduct(a, b) + x * y`, which follows directly from the recursive definition.\n\n2. **Loop invariants:**\n   - Standard bounds and length tracking (`0 <= i <= |a|`, `|b| == i`)\n   - `AllNonZero(b)` and `AllBounded(b, 100)` — maintained because each appended element comes from `a` (which is nonzero and bounded)\n   - **Even steps:** `DotProduct(a[..i], b) == 0` — the partial dot product is zero after each complete pair\n   - **Odd steps:** `DotProduct(a[..i], b) == a[i-1] * a[i]` — after processing the first element of a pair, the partial sum is `a[2k] * a[2k+1]`, which will be cancelled by the next element\n\n3. **In-body assertions:** `a[..i] + [a[i]] == a[..i+1]` connects the lemma's concatenation form to the slice form, and `a[..|a|] == a` after the loop."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":214,"cache_read_input_tokens":34427,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":214},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"b1ddeb00-0880-4222-b24d-df95c85101bd","uuid":"6d51b125-4035-4cfd-b76f-645fef62e86b"},{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":206495,"duration_api_ms":204201,"num_turns":4,"result":"The program verifies successfully.
